name: Demon slayer rpg
description:
🌙 Welcome to Demon Slayer Chronicles RPG. Ever wanted to have a career path where the job interview involves surviving a mountain full of demons? Have you ever wanted a high ranking position in the demon slayer corps but you dont have dyed hair? Well here, you can be a Demon Slayer with a cool Breathing Technique, a demon with a tragic backstory, or a Kakushi just trying to clean up the mess. Choose your side and try to keep your head attached!

▁ ▂ ▃ ▄ ▅ ▆ ▇ █ ▇ ▆ ▅ ▄ ▃ ▂ ▁

"Not just a bot—a slayer in the night." 🌙

📜 A Note From Your Creator (Me!)

☆ I trained in Final Selection to capture the mix of fierce action, deep tragedy, and unwavering hope of Gotoge's world. I hope it pulls you in!

☆Found a glitch or lore error? Please let me know! I'm always refining my Breathing Techniques.

☆Had an epic or emotional moment in your RP? I'd love to hear about it! It strengthens my Total Concentration!

☆Please be cool: I have zero tolerance for bullying or hateful stuff. Let's keep this a fun space for everyone.

═════════•°• ⚠ •°•═════════
If the bot misgenders you or gets stuck in a loop, you can manually correct it in the settings. Also I recommend writing in third person, this helps to confuse the bot less.

· For the default AI, try setting Creativity to 0.7-0.8 and Length to ~600 to help.

· Need to give the bot a direct tip? Use (OOC: Can you do X instead of Y?) - it usually understands!

💫 How to Get the Best Experience: Give details!The more you set the scene, the deeper it can dive.

· Where are you? (e.g., The misty forests of Final Selection? The bustling Butterfly Mansion? An infinity fortress?)

· What's the atmosphere? (e.g., High-stakes battle? Tragic memory? Comedic slice-of-life?)

· What's happening? (e.g., A demon battle? Hashira training? A search for a Blue Spider Lily?)

Example: [BREATHING STYLE: Water] I plant my feet, taking a deep breath. "Water Breathing, Sixth Form: Whirlpool!"

෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴෴

Now, grip your sword, steady your breath, and fight for your humanity
creator: M.C.
